Product Summary

The 1-litre graduated bottles by Fra-Ber serve as essential tools for quickly diluting products. Available in three different colours: blue, green and black. 

Product Description

THE BENEFITS OF GRADUATED BOTTLES

The 1-litre graduated bottles by Fra-Ber serve as essential tools for quickly diluting products and consist of multiple parts that can be individually purchased as required. Available in three different colours: blue, green and black.

It consists of the following parts:

1-Liter graduated bottle: this is the container with the graduated scale;

Main features:

Graduated scale: clear markings indicating the main dilutions from 1:1 to 1:20, simplifying the process of diluting products and avoiding calculation errors or approximate dilutions;

Multi-format: they are available in three different colours, blue, green and black, making the various containers immediately identifiable when used in different contexts with different products;

Markings every 50 ml: the 50 ml markings allow additional dosing for special needs;

SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE

700520 - 1-LITRE BLUE GRADUATED BOTTLE

700521 - 1-LITRE BLACK GRADUATED BOTTLE

700519 - 1-LITRE GREEN GRADUATED BOTTLE

WHO WE ARE

### DETAILER SA

**Based in Sandton, South Africa, we are your one-stop shop who provides you with a place to get all the products you need for your automobile, household, office, boats and WCs. **
**Thanks to our valuable background in the car washing industry, we have gained the necessary knowledge and skills needed to know what brands and products will get the best results. **
**You won't need to shop at various stores to get what you are looking for because we have sourced industry-leading brands from across the globe, that thrive on constant innovation and put them all in one convenient place. **
